# Landing page project exploration (2026-03-09 03:19Z)

_**User**_

Explore the landing page project at D:\Work\Projects\ws-rio-agora\product\landing to understand:
1. The overall project structure (list key files and folders)
2. Find all files related to "agenda" - search for the word "agenda" in all files
3. Find any component that renders speaker/palestrante bios or agenda items
4. Check the public/images/agenda/ folder for what images exist there
5. Look at the src/components/ folder structure

Be thorough - search for "agenda", "palestrante", "speaker", "Temporão", "Miguel Lago" or any similar terms that might indicate existing agenda content.

Return: file tree, all agenda-related file paths and their content summaries, and any image files in public/images/agenda/
